meta.title: Industries We Serve | AWSOverseas
meta.description: AWSOverseas sources verified manufacturers and provides international shipping for manufacturing, eCommerce, pharmaceutical, textile, automotive, and other industries worldwide.

hero.title: Sourcing and Shipping Built for Every Industry
hero.subtitle: Every industry sources differently and ships differently. AWSOverseas pairs verified manufacturers and quality inspection with freight forwarding, customs clearance, and global shipping — matched to how your industry actually operates.

overview.title: Industries We Empower
overview.description: Our supplier network and shipping operation work together to get businesses across diverse industries the right product, verified and shipped safely and cost-effectively. Whether you are sourcing raw materials, finished products, or specialized cargo, our team provides tailored sourcing and shipping solutions that meet your business needs.

industriesGrid.title: Industries We Serve
industriesGrid.description: Comprehensive shipping solutions designed for businesses across multiple sectors.

manufacturing.title: Manufacturing Industry
manufacturing.description: We source raw materials, components, and industrial equipment from verified Indian manufacturers, then move them through our global shipping network.

ecommerce.title: eCommerce Businesses
ecommerce.description: We source private-label and catalog products from Indian suppliers and provide fast, scalable shipping for online businesses, marketplaces, and international sellers.

pharmaceutical.title: Pharmaceutical Industry
pharmaceutical.description: We identify and verify compliant manufacturers for healthcare products, then handle secure transportation with regulatory documentation support.

textile.title: Textile & Apparel
textile.description: We source fabrics and garments from verified mills and manufacturers, with quality inspection before export and efficient supply chain management to destination.

automotive.title: Automotive Industry
automotive.description: We source automotive components and spare parts from verified Indian manufacturers and manage reliable transportation of parts, machinery, and finished vehicles worldwide.

cta.title: Looking for Industry-Specific Sourcing or Shipping?
cta.description: Our team is ready to source verified suppliers and build a customized shipping strategy that fits your industry and global supply chain.
